creator: zaa@zaa.pp.ru
text:
Smarty authors relased updated version 2.6.24.
Attached is corrected patch.

Thanks.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

diff -urbN smarty.orig/Makefile smarty/Makefile
--- smarty.orig/Makefile	2009-01-14 12:14:52.000000000 +0300
+++ smarty/Makefile	2009-05-21 19:38:40.000000000 +0400
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	smarty
-PORTVERSION=	2.6.22
+PORTVERSION=	2.6.24
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.smarty.net/distributions/ \
 		http://www.smarty.net/distributions/manual/en/:manual
diff -urbN smarty.orig/distinfo smarty/distinfo
--- smarty.orig/distinfo	2009-01-14 12:14:52.000000000 +0300
+++ smarty/distinfo	2009-05-21 19:38:58.000000000 +0400
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
-MD5 (Smarty-2.6.22.tar.gz) = ffcd50bcdba6dda7c3d95d23eb5121cd
-SHA256 (Smarty-2.6.22.tar.gz) = 083a5eed2ac616b1ec9a57ff794cf077c7af55aa5b19265bdc743b74c054fafc
-SIZE (Smarty-2.6.22.tar.gz) = 158540
+MD5 (Smarty-2.6.24.tar.gz) = ea4b651bcd8f1a6596a214ad2c8fc302
+SHA256 (Smarty-2.6.24.tar.gz) = 062840673eabac025b9c033f42b6466d70f7b0c5d99469203f6c0d51e62d8e58
+SIZE (Smarty-2.6.24.tar.gz) = 153038
 MD5 (Smarty-2.6.14-docs.tar.gz) = 5123152dd248898a84b96b806f551e78
 SHA256 (Smarty-2.6.14-docs.tar.gz) = f3d36af8f59ade56d7e5f563273d99e3df2b8a6a86b9fab37a5386a6cae9a401
 SIZE (Smarty-2.6.14-docs.tar.gz) = 137509
